\\documentclass[11pt]{article}

% Encodage et qualité typographique
\\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\\usepackage[french]{babel}
\\usepackage{lmodern}
\\usepackage{microtype}

% Mise en page sobre et lisible
\\usepackage[a4paper,margin=2.8cm]{geometry}
\\usepackage{parskip}
\\usepackage{setspace}
\\setstretch{1.06}

% Palette discrète pour la hiérarchie visuelle
\\usepackage{xcolor}
\\definecolor{TheseTitle}{HTML}{111111}
\\definecolor{TheseMetaTitle}{HTML}{2B2B2B}
\\definecolor{TheseMetaText}{HTML}{333333}
\\definecolor{TheseRule}{HTML}{D0D0D0}

% IMPORTS MyST/JTeX (macros, packages, etc.)
[- IMPORTS -]

% Bloc éditorial court, propre, et conditionnel
\\newcommand{\\EditorialSection}[2]{%
  \\par\\vspace{0.85em}%
  {\\noindent\\large\\bfseries\\color{TheseMetaTitle} #1\\par}%
  \\vspace{0.25em}%
  {\\noindent\\color{TheseMetaText} #2\\par}%
}

\\begin{document}

% --- Tête de chapitre ---
{\\noindent\\LARGE\\bfseries\\color{TheseTitle} [- doc.title -]\\par}
\\vspace{0.8em}
\\noindent\\color{TheseRule}\\rule{\\textwidth}{0.5pt}

[%- if parts.abstract %]
\\EditorialSection{Résumé}{[- parts.abstract -]}
[%- endif %]

[%- if parts.problematic %]
\\EditorialSection{Problématique}{[- parts.problematic -]}
[%- endif %]

[%- if parts.literature_note %]
\\EditorialSection{Littérature mobilisée}{[- parts.literature_note -]}
[%- endif %]

[%- if doc.keywords %]
\\EditorialSection{Mots-clés}{[- doc.keywords | join(', ') -]}
[%- endif %]

[%- if parts.partial_conclusion %]
\\EditorialSection{Conclusion partielle}{[- parts.partial_conclusion -]}
[%- endif %]

\\vspace{1.1em}
\\noindent\\color{TheseRule}\\rule{\\textwidth}{0.5pt}
\\vspace{1.2em}

% --- Corps du chapitre ---
[- CONTENT -]

\\end{document}
